videos.title: The SEARCH For an UNSEEN Owyhee Waterfall
videos.description:
Support my Partners:
K-Suspension: https://geni.us/Ksuspension
Join our Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/c/venture2roam
Save 20% on OnX Offroad: https://geni.us/OnXOffroad V2R20

We go in search of a hard to find, hard to get to waterfall in the middle of the Owyhee Wilderness. This epic overland outdoor camping adventure requires me to drive, hike, and even bike in order to find an absolutely beautiful treasure in the Owhyee outback.

videos.title: Ranger Raptor. Canyon AT4X AEV. Tacoma TRD Pro. One Honest Verdict.
videos.description:
The Ginger has driven them all. Paul has opinions about all of them. 
And neither of them have any intention of being diplomatic about any of it.

#FordRaptor #ToyotaTacoma #CanyonAT4X

In this episode two lifetime Jeep guys sit down and give you the most unfiltered, unsponsored, unapologetically honest verdict on the three biggest off road truck competitors on the market right now.

The Ford Ranger Raptor. 
The GMC Canyon AT4X. 
The Toyota Tacoma TRD Pro. 

Three trucks that have been making a

videos.title: Control Email File Chaos - Use Power Automate, with AI and SharePoint
videos.description: Learn how to automatically sort and route email attachments using Power Automate and AI. When an email comes in with a bunch of attachments, this flow loops through each one, uses an AI prompt to figure out what it is (invoice, purchase order, resume, or other), saves it to the right SharePoint folder, and extracts the key data into the file properties. Then I show a second way to do the same thing using Copilot in SharePoint with autofill columns. The whole idea is sprinkling a little AI into t

videos.title: Stay Ahead of Power Platform, Dynamics 365 & Copilot Releases 🚀 | Microsoft Release Planner App
videos.description:
Keeping up with Microsoft's release plans can be challenging. New features are constantly being announced across Power Platform, Dynamics 365, and Microsoft Copilot, with varying release dates, statuses, and cloud availability.

Knowing what's coming, when a feature is releasing, whether it's in Preview or General Availability (GA), and whether it's available in Commercial & GCC environments can quickly become overwhelming.

In this video, I showcase the Microsoft Power CAT team's Release Planne

videos.title: Dynamics Minds: Human-Centric Tech Event
videos.description:
Is tech really about humans? 🤔

Dynamics Minds dives deep into the human side of technology. This event challenges us to think about how tech serves customers, not just features. It's not just about new settings; it's about understanding the people behind the tech.

Join the conversation and discover what makes this event a must-attend!

#DynamicsMinds #TechForHumans #PowerPlatform

videos.title: Overcoming Public Speaking Fear
videos.description:
From shy to speaking in front of thousands! 🎤

Ever felt terrified of public speaking? Dewain shares his journey from being extremely shy to confidently addressing large crowds. It all started with a job at Six Flags, where he had to tell corny jokes on a train! Discover how he overcame his fear and learned to communicate effectively.

What’s your biggest fear in public speaking?

#PublicSpeaking #OvercomingFear #Confidence

videos.title: The Ultimate Google Omni Prompting Guide (Full Tutorial)
videos.description:
Gemini Omni is one of the most incredible video models out there, but most people only use it for AI avatars. Here are five specific strengths and the prompts I use to unlock the other 90% of what Omni can actually do.

Heads up, some Omni features may not be available in your region or on your plan yet.

🔗 This video is not sponsored.

0:00 Intro
0:30 Editing Real Videos
5:54 Camera Movements
8:03 Translations
9:28 Real World Understanding
12:11 Text Rendering
12:57 Outro

videos.description:
Pomelli is Google's free AI marketing agent that builds your brand kit, product photos, ad campaigns, and even a full website in a few clicks — here's how to use every feature.

videos.title: The AI Token Shortage Begins
videos.description:
Recap of May's major AI shift from subsidized seat pricing to a token-based economy driven by agentic usage and runaway API consumption. Coverage of business-model pivots to usage-based billing, enterprise deployment and consulting plays, and market responses including cheaper specialized models. Analysis of compute and infrastructure competition highlighted by SpaceX/Colossus partnerships, corporate AI sticker shock, and emerging policy debates over token taxes and data-center moratoriums.

The
